action_set_definitions.name: get_mission_state
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current mission clock, weather conditions, and total survivors found.

action_set_definitions.name: list_rescue_units
action_set_definitions.description: Returns a list of all active UAS and Ground units with their current ID, type, battery level, location, and C2 link status.

action_set_definitions.name: get_sector_info
action_set_definitions.description: Provides detailed information about a specific sector, including signal strength and hazard status.

sector_id.description: The ID of the sector to query (e.g., 'Sector D-1').

action_set_definitions.name: move_unit
action_set_definitions.description: Dispatches a specific unit to a target sector. Consumes battery based on distance.

unit_id.description: ID of the unit to move.

action_set_definitions.name: optimize_signal
action_set_definitions.description: Deploys a signal relay or adjusts UAS positioning to stabilize Command-and-Control (C2) links in a sector.

sector_id.description: The sector where signal needs stabilization.

action_set_definitions.name: perform_thermal_interrogation
action_set_definitions.description: Executes a thermal scan to confirm the heat signature of a subject. Must be performed by a UAS unit.

action_set_definitions.name: initiate_evacuation
action_set_definitions.description: Starts the extraction process for a found subject. Requires a ground team and a stable communication path to the recovery zone.

ground_unit_id.description: ID of the ground team performing extraction.

sector_id.description: Sector where the survivor is located.

recovery_zone.description: The destination sector for the survivor.

state_description.mission_clock_minutes: Total minutes elapsed since the start of the mission.
state_description.weather_condition: Current atmospheric conditions affecting flight and visibility (e.g., 'clear', 'heavy_rain', 'fog').
state_description.rescue_units: List of active units including drones and ground teams with their current location, status, and resources.
state_description.sector_map: A mapping of sector IDs to their status (e.g., 'unexplored', 'searched', 'hazard_detected').
state_description.survivors_found: The count of survivors successfully located and identified.
state_description.internal_survivor_locations: Hidden data representing the actual location and health of survivors yet to be found. (Internal use only).
